name: Artichoke Zucchini Saute
recipeInstructions: Prepare artichokes as for the "Artichoke Gondolas" recipe, but do not steam. When prepared, cut into very thin strips, lengthwise. Saute the artichoke strips, garlic, and green onions in oil in a wok for about 5 minutes, until the artichokes are tender. Add zucchini, wine, and thyme; cook until the zucchini is tender, only another 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, salt, and pepper; cook until thoroughly heated.
